narrative.headline: 2020 Nissan Murano: forward collision avoidance tops the owner complaints
narrative.summary: Owners filed 44 complaints with NHTSA. The forward collision avoidance system is the most reported area at 32%, followed by the suspension (16%). No fires and no deaths are reported across any area. The collision avoidance complaints are the only ones tied to harm, with 1 crash and 2 injuries, so that system is worth a close look on a test drive.

issues.title: Forward Collision Avoidance
issues.blurb: The single biggest complaint: 14 reports (32%), tied to 1 crash and 2 injuries. The only area in this list linked to harm, so check the automatic braking behavior carefully.
